Married at 16 to Rajesh, who knocked her up with Priya, she’s endured his absence and neglect, leaving her sexually frustrated and financially desperate. Her daughters are her world, but her body’s hunger drives her into a secret affair with Rahim, a wealthy resident who pays for her “services.” She revels in his fetish for her unwashed, malodorous body, finding empowerment in her raw allure despite her shame.
